name: Fire King Avatar Yaksha
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>炎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ヤクシャ
desc: If a face-up "Fire King" monster(s) you control is destroyed by card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is destroyed and sent to the GY: You can destroy 1 card in your hand or field. You can only use this effect of "Fire King Avatar Yaksha" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If a face-up "Fire King" monster(s) you control is destroyed by card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is destroyed and sent to the GY: You can destroy 1 card in your hand or field. You can only use this effect of "Fire King Avatar Yaksha" once per turn.
eff: If a face-up "Fire King" monster(s) you control is destroyed by card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is destroyed and sent to the GY: You can destroy 1 card in your hand or field. You can only use this effect of "Fire King Avatar Yaksha" once per turn.

jp_sets.set: Structure Deck R: Onslaught of the Fire Kings

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
